name: Asaf Axelrod
title: Full-stack developer building practical, user-facing software with a bias toward clarity and ownership.
summary: AsafOS is the portfolio version of my resume: a concise view of my experience, current studies, engineering style, and the tools and interests that shape how I work.
current: Pursuing a B.Sc. in Computer Science while continuing to improve product and engineering depth.
openTo: Software engineering roles with room for ownership, product thinking, and steady technical growth.
about: I served as a tank commander in the Israeli Defense Forces, where I learned to stay calm under pressure, communicate clearly, and take responsibility for outcomes.

After military service, I shifted my focus toward software and built hands-on experience in full-stack development. I worked at Matrix from May 2023 through July 2025 in the Software Products division.
I treat software work as a mix of engineering discipline and product judgment: systems should be understandable, useful, and maintainable.
highlights: Comfortable with iterative cleanup and refactoring
Curiosity across backend, frontend, and UX

experience.summary: Worked in the Software Products division, contributing to customer-facing software and internal engineering delivery. Focus areas included implementation quality, iteration speed, and practical problem solving across the stack.
Led under pressure, coordinated people and decisions in real time, and built habits around responsibility, discipline, and execution.

education.title: B.Sc. in Computer Science · The College of Management Academic Studies
education.summary: Formal CS studies in parallel with ongoing software development and portfolio work.

education.title: Full-stack training · CyberPro
education.summary: Structured foundation in web development and the transition into professional software work.
